name: Oysters Rockefeller
recipeIngredient: 3 scallions, including 1 inch of green tops
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 450°F. Combine the scallions, celery, parsley, and spinach and mince them with a knife or chop in a blender or food processor. Put the mixture into a bowl with the bread crumbs, Tabasco, and Worcestershire sauce. Add the butter and salt to taste, and cream all together into a smooth paste. Spread 1 inch of rock salt over a pan or baking dish large enough to hold the oyster shells or use crumbled foil. Arrange the oysters on top. Put 1 tablespoon of butter mixture on each oyster and bake for 10 minutes or until the mixture has melted.
